name: account
description: An account update produced during transaction execution or bank hashing.  Metadata only — the data bytes are not included.

lamports.description: The account lamport balance after the update

owner.description: The account owner program public key (32 bytes)

executable.description: 1 if the account is executable, 0 otherwise

slot.description: The slot in which the update occurred

signature.description: Signature of the transaction that caused this update (64 bytes); all-zero if not associated with a transaction (e.g. bank-hash-time updates)

data_sz.description: The size of the account data in bytes
